unresolved_same_name.name: traffic

evidence_refs.quote: traffic was a factor this period

unresolved_same_name.why: Evidence is too thin to decide: each child has exactly 1 ref, and both quotes ("traffic was a factor this period" — AAA transcript evA6; "traffic trends were mixed" — BBB transcript evB5) never identify the object (store foot traffic vs web/site traffic vs network traffic), scope, or mechanism. The 3-check (same object/metric, same scope, same mechanism) is unverifiable on all three points, so SAME cannot be asserted. DIFFERENT also cannot be executed honestly: the quotes contain no qualifying nouns to build more-specific names from (only state words like "factor"/"mixed"/"trends", banned by DriverOntology R7), and there is no positive evidence the two usages diverge. Fail-close: park for more evidence.
